question: According to the chart data, during which period did the river water level increase by the larger amount?

options.A: Both periods show about the same increase
options.B: It cannot be determined from the chart

explanation: The chart uses a non-linear (inappropriate) y-axis scaling function, so equal vertical distances do not correspond to equal changes in the underlying values. That can make one period look like it changed more even when the data show otherwise. 2018-2020: 110 cm → 150 cm (+40 cm); 2022-2024: 200 cm → 251 cm (+51 cm).
